programme.desc: Highlights from the 2026 Legends Tour, as the Barbados Legends came next on the calendar - taking place at the scenic Apes Hill.

programme.title: U.S. Open Golf Official Film 2011
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2011 US Open which was held at Congressional Country Club in Maryland. Northern Ireland's Rory McIlroy stormed to the first Major title of his career.

programme.title: Byron Nelson 2023 Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the 2023 AT&T Byron Nelson, taking place at TPC Craig Ranch in Texas. Past champions include 2022 winner KH Lee, Tiger Woods, Vijay Singh and Jack Nicklaus.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Patty Tavatanakit
programme.desc: Former and current pros take viewers behind the ropes on the course, discussing such things as shot setup, club selection, and strategy. Here, Patty Tavatanakit leads the lesson.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Kamaiu Johnson
programme.desc: With multiple wins on the APGA Tour, Kamaiu Johnson joins Bones on the course to share his tips and strategies for optimum success.

programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Ep 9.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, learn how to emulate professional players to refine your technique. Ep 21.

programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Insperity Invitational - a PGA Tour Champions event at the Woodlands in Texas. The 2009 Champion Golfer of the Year Stewart Cink scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day two of the PGA Tour's CJ CUP Byron Nelson, taking place at TPC Craig Ranch in Texas. Scottie Scheffler dominated his hometown event last year, finishing at 31 under.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer Tom Watson
programme.desc: A product of the US, Watson crossed the Atlantic to win British hearts. A fascinating look at the epic battles and agonising disappointment for The Open's greatest champion.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer Padraig Harrington
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's great champions. Here, the focus is on Irishman Padraig Harrington, a two-time Open winner who took back-to-back titles in 2007 and 2008.
